titleStmt.title: SII 29.202: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 202. (A.R. No. B. 460 of 1961-62.) DHARMAPURI, MOMINABAD TALUK, BHIR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Impression received from Dy. Dir. Arch., Aurangabad, Maharashtra.

This fragmentary inscription probably recorded a grant, the details of which is lost. It contains only imprecatory section. It mentions yāpanīya. The order of a yati (probably belonging to yāpanīya Sangha) mentioned as Lakshmivaranidhi guṇa vīra vraṭīṁdra caused the inscription (of a grant) to be engraved (on stone).
The record was composed by Īśvara Bhaṭṭa. The record is in characters of the 11th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ssaraḷāgama (śira) parivāra
kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhi sarvvā
bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdra
ttaṁ vāyō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣa saha
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā
rādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmi stasyatasya
svaṁ dātu sameha(tu)kyaṁ dukha manyasya pāḷanaṁ . dānapā
rmvadhyē dānātuśrēyōnupāḷanaṁ . Ā(dha)kṣatriya(ṁli)tta(dā)
parittī dēvabhōgaṁgaḷaṁ (kaḷa)didhātriye nāganapaḍa pada gīttaṁta
gaḷaṁ bādhaṁ tāvene dharmmamaṁ kiḍisuva vyādhaṁge kēḷsaṁtati (ya)
viyāga mārtthaviḷayaṁ tāna(pa)mavyākuḷā(rā)gorava
ra pāruvara piriyara kālgarcci biṭṭa dēvasva manōrvvaregōḷva
ḷadoḷu paramārtthaṁgā(dana)māgi naḍu taṁ
da yāpanīyāṁbujavanadina pā tavidva
dyatama jyōtīta guṇagaṇanunnata maunadhēnu
lakṣmī varanidhi guṇavīravratīṁdrājñeyiṁtāsanamaṁ sa
majñāṁbudhanidhi baradaṁ sūkti lakṣmī viḷāsa .
matkavirājavallabha(ṁ)nīśvara bhaṭṭara barahaṁ mā
Digital edition of SII 29.202 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
